author: Dexterity104
title: General multi-language smart-contract vulnerability miner
notes: A general high/critical vulnerability miner for the sn60__bitsec/miner lane. Ranks the project's own source across Solidity, Vyper, Rust, Move and Cairo; a triage pass that also picks audit targets, then deep and wide source audits, plus model-free structural checks. Findings localized to exact file and function. No project-specific or benchmark-specific content.
